tEn: VIMA: General Robot Manipulation with Multimodal Prompts
tZh: VIMA：基于多模态提示的通用机器人操作
sEn: VIMA uses multimodal prompts to unify diverse robot manipulation tasks, achieving strong generalization and data efficiency.
sZh: VIMA通过多模态提示统一多种机器人操作任务，在零样本泛化中成功率提升2.9倍，数据效率提升2.7倍。
absEn: Prompt-based learning has emerged as a successful paradigm in natural language processing, where a single general-purpose language model can be instructed to perform any task specified by input prompts. Yet task specification in robotics comes in various forms, such as imitating one-shot demonstrations, following language instructions, and reaching visual goals. They are often considered different tasks and tackled by specialized models. We show that a wide spectrum of robot manipulation tasks can be expressed with multimodal prompts, interleaving textual and visual tokens. Accordingly, we develop a new simulation benchmark that consists of thousands of procedurally-generated tabletop tasks with multimodal prompts, 600K+ expert trajectories for imitation learning, and a four-level evaluation protocol for systematic generalization. We design a transformer-based robot agent, VIMA, that processes these prompts and outputs motor actions autoregressively. VIMA features a recipe that achieves strong model scalability and data efficiency. It outperforms alternative designs in the hardest zero-shot generalization setting by up to $2.9\times$ task success rate given the same training data. With $10\times$ less training data, VIMA still performs $2.7\times$ better than the best competing variant. Code and video demos are available at https://vimalabs.github.io/
absZh: 基于提示的学习已成为自然语言处理中的成功范式，其中单个通用语言模型可以按照输入提示执行任何任务。然而，机器人中的任务规范有多种形式，例如模仿一次性演示、遵循语言指令和达到视觉目标。它们通常被视为不同的任务，并由专门的模型处理。我们表明，广泛的机器人操作任务可以用多模态提示来表达，交织文本和视觉标记。因此，我们开发了一个新的模拟基准，包含数千个程序生成的桌面任务和多模态提示，超过60万条专家轨迹用于模仿学习，以及一个四级评估协议用于系统泛化。我们设计了一个基于Transformer的机器人智能体VIMA，它处理这些提示并自回归地输出电机动作。VIMA采用了一种实现强大模型可扩展性和数据效率的方案。在相同的训练数据下，它在最难零样本泛化设置中的任务成功率比替代设计高出2.9倍。在训练数据减少10倍的情况下，VIMA仍然比最佳竞争变体好2.7倍。代码和视频演示可在https://vimalabs.github.io/获取。

contrib.en: Proposes multimodal prompting to unify diverse robot manipulation tasks into a single sequence modeling problem.
contrib.zh: 提出多模态提示方法，将多种机器人操作任务统一为单一序列建模问题。

contrib.en: Develops VIMA-Bench, a simulation benchmark with 17 tasks, 600K+ expert trajectories, and a four-level evaluation protocol.
contrib.zh: 开发VIMA-Bench仿真基准，包含17个任务、60万+专家轨迹和四级评估协议。

contrib.en: Designs VIMA, a transformer-based agent with object-centric tokens and cross-attention conditioning for multimodal prompts.
contrib.zh: 设计VIMA，一种基于Transformer的智能体，采用以对象为中心的标记和交叉注意力条件化处理多模态提示。

contrib.en: Achieves up to 2.9x task success rate over baselines in zero-shot generalization with same training data.
contrib.zh: 在相同训练数据下，零样本泛化任务成功率比基线高出最多2.9倍。

contrib.en: Demonstrates strong data efficiency: with 10x less data, VIMA still outperforms best competitor by 2.7x.
contrib.zh: 展示强大的数据效率：使用少10倍的数据，VIMA仍比最佳竞争对手高出2.7倍。

contrib.en: Provides open-source code, benchmark, and pre-trained models for reproducibility.
contrib.zh: 提供开源代码、基准和预训练模型，确保可复现性。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to simulated tabletop tasks; real-world robot deployment not tested.
limits.zh: 评估仅限于仿真桌面任务；未测试真实机器人部署。

limits.en: Relies on pre-trained object detector (Mask R-CNN) which may fail in novel environments.
limits.zh: 依赖预训练的目标检测器（Mask R-CNN），在新环境中可能失败。

limits.en: Behavioral cloning from expert trajectories may not handle suboptimal or noisy demonstrations.
limits.zh: 从专家轨迹进行行为克隆可能无法处理次优或有噪声的演示。

limits.en: Zero-shot generalization to novel tasks (L4) still shows significant performance drop.
limits.zh: 对新颖任务（L4）的零样本泛化仍表现出显著性能下降。

limits.en: Model scalability tested up to 200M parameters; larger models may have different behaviors.
limits.zh: 模型可扩展性测试至2亿参数；更大模型可能表现不同。

items.en: Prompt-based learning has emerged as a successful paradigm in natural language processing, where a single general-purpose language model can be instructed to perform any task specified by input prompts. Yet task specification in robotics comes in various forms, such as imitating one-shot demonstrations, following language instructions, and reaching visual goals. They are often considered different tasks and tackled by specialized models. We show that a wide spectrum of robot manipulation tasks can be expressed with multimodal prompts, interleaving textual and visual tokens. Accordingly, we develop a new simulation benchmark that consists of thousands of procedurally-generated tabletop tasks with multimodal prompts, 600K+ expert trajectories for imitation learning, and a four-level evaluation protocol for systematic generalization. We design a transformer-based robot agent, VIMA, that processes these prompts and outputs motor actions autoregressively. VIMA features a recipe that achieves strong model scalability and data efficiency. It outperforms alternative designs in the hardest zero-shot generalization setting by up to 2.9×2.9\times task success rate given the same training data. With 10×10\times less training data, VIMA still performs 2.7×2.7\times better than the best competing variant. Code and video demos are available at vimalabs.github.io.
items.zh: 基于提示的学习已成为自然语言处理中的成功范式，其中单个通用语言模型可以被指示执行由输入提示指定的任何任务。然而，机器人领域的任务规范有多种形式，例如模仿一次性演示、遵循语言指令和达到视觉目标。这些通常被视为不同的任务，并由专门的模型处理。我们表明，广泛的机器人操作任务可以用多模态提示来表达，交织文本和视觉标记。因此，我们开发了一个新的仿真基准，包含数千个程序生成的桌面任务（带有多模态提示）、用于模仿学习的60万+专家轨迹，以及用于系统泛化的四级评估协议。我们设计了一个基于Transformer的机器人智能体VIMA，它处理这些提示并自回归地输出电机动作。VIMA具有实现强大模型可扩展性和数据效率的方案。在相同训练数据下，它在最难的零样本泛化设置中优于替代设计，任务成功率高达2.9倍。即使训练数据减少10倍，VIMA的性能仍比最佳竞争变体好2.7倍。代码和视频演示可在vimalabs.github.io获取。

items.en: Transformer models (Vaswani et al., 2017) have given rise to remarkable multi-task consolidation across many AI domains. For example, users can describe a task using natural language prompt to GPT-3 (Brown et al., 2020), allowing the same model to perform question answering, machine translation, text summarization, etc. Prompt-based learning provides an accessible and flexible interface to communicate a natural language understanding task to a general-purpose model.
items.zh: Transformer模型（Vaswani等人，2017）已在许多AI领域实现了显著的多任务整合。例如，用户可以使用自然语言提示向GPT-3（Brown等人，2020）描述任务，使同一模型能够执行问答、机器翻译、文本摘要等。基于提示的学习提供了一种可访问且灵活的接口，用于向通用模型传达自然语言理解任务。

items.en: We envision that a generalist robot should have a similarly intuitive and expressive interface for task specification. What does such an interface for robot learning look like? As a motivating example, consider a personal robot tasked with household activities. We can ask the robot to bring us a cup of water by a simple natural language instruction. If we require more specificity, we can instead instruct the robot to “bring me <image of the cup>”. For tasks requiring new skills, the robot should be able to adapt, preferably from a few video demonstrations (Duan et al., 2017). Tasks that need interaction with unfamiliar objects can be easily explained via a few image examples for novel concept grounding (Hermann et al., 2017). Finally, to ensure safe deployment, we can further specify visual constraints like “do not enter <image> room”.
items.zh: 我们设想，一个通用机器人应该拥有类似直观且富有表现力的任务规范接口。这样的机器人学习接口是什么样的？作为一个激励性示例，考虑一个负责家务活动的个人机器人。我们可以通过简单的自然语言指令让机器人给我们带一杯水。如果需要更具体，我们可以指示机器人“给我拿<杯子的图像>”。对于需要新技能的任务，机器人应该能够适应，最好是通过一些视频演示（Duan等人，2017）。需要与不熟悉对象交互的任务可以通过几个图像示例轻松解释，用于新概念接地（Hermann等人，2017）。最后，为了确保安全部署，我们可以进一步指定视觉约束，例如“不要进入<图像>房间”。

items.en: To enable a single agent with all these capabilities, we make three key contributions in this work: 1) a novel multimodal prompting formulation that converts a wide spectrum of robot manipulation tasks into one sequence modeling problem; 2) a large-scale benchmark with diverse tasks to systematically evaluate an agent’s scalability and generalization; and 3) a multimodal-prompted robot agent capable of multi-task and zero-shot generalization.
items.zh: 为了实现具有所有这些能力的单一智能体，我们在本文中做出了三个关键贡献：1）一种新颖的多模态提示公式，将广泛的机器人操作任务转化为一个序列建模问题；2）一个大规模基准，包含多样化的任务，用于系统评估智能体的可扩展性和泛化能力；3）一个多模态提示驱动的机器人智能体，能够实现多任务和零样本泛化。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Multimodal prompts for task specification. We observe that many robot manipulation tasks can be expressed as multimodal prompts that interleave language and image/video frames. We introduce VIMA, an embodied agent capable of processing mulitimodal prompts (left) and controlling a robot arm to solve the task (right).
items.capZh: 图1：用于任务规范的多模态提示。我们观察到，许多机器人操作任务可以表示为交织语言和图像/视频帧的多模态提示。我们引入了VIMA，一个能够处理多模态提示（左）并控制机器人手臂解决任务（右）的具身智能体。

items.en: We start with the observation that many robot manipulation tasks can be formulated by multimodal prompts that interleave language and images or video frames (Fig. 1). For example, Rearrangement (Batra et al., 2020), a type of Visual Goal, can be formulated as “Please rearrange objects to match this {scene_image}”; Few-shot Imitation can embed video snippet in the prompt “Follow this motion trajectory for the wooden cube: {frame1},{frame2},{frame3},{frame4}subscriptframe1subscriptframe2subscriptframe3subscriptframe4\{\texttt{frame}_{1}\},\{\texttt{frame}_{2}\},\{\texttt{frame}_{3}\},\{\texttt{frame}_{4}\}”. Multimodal prompts not only have more expressive power than individual modalities but also enable a uniform sequence IO interface for training generalist robots. Previously, different robot manipulation tasks required distinct policy architectures, objective functions, data pipelines, and training procedures (Aceituno et al., 2021; Stengel-Eskin et al., 2022; Lynch & Sermanet, 2021), leading to siloed robot systems that cannot be easily combined for a rich set of use cases. Instead, our multimodal prompt interface allows us to harness the latest advances in large transformer models (Lin et al., 2021; Tay et al., 2020; Khan et al., 2021) for developing scalable multi-task robot learners.
items.zh: 我们从观察开始，许多机器人操作任务可以通过交织语言和图像或视频帧的多模态提示来表述（图1）。例如，重排（Batra等人，2020），一种视觉目标类型，可以表述为“请将物体重新排列以匹配此{场景图像}”；少样本模仿可以将视频片段嵌入提示中“请遵循木块的此运动轨迹：{帧1},{帧2},{帧3},{帧4}”。多模态提示不仅比单一模态具有更强的表达能力，而且为训练通用机器人提供了统一的序列输入输出接口。以前，不同的机器人操作任务需要不同的策略架构、目标函数、数据流水线和训练程序（Aceituno等人，2021；Stengel-Eskin等人，2022；Lynch & Sermanet，2021），导致机器人系统孤立，难以轻松组合以用于丰富的用例。相反，我们的多模态提示接口使我们能够利用大型Transformer模型的最新进展（Lin等人，2021；Tay等人，2020；Khan等人，2021）来开发可扩展的多任务机器人学习器。

items.en: To systematically evaluate agents with multimodal prompts, we develop a new benchmark, named VIMA-Bench, built on the Ravens simulator (Zeng et al., 2020; Shridhar et al., 2021). We provide 17 representative tasks with multimodal prompt templates. Each task can be procedurally instantiated into thousands of instances by various combinations of textures and tabletop objects. VIMA-Bench establishes a four-level protocol to evaluate progressively stronger generalization capabilities, from randomized object placement to novel tasks (Fig. 2).
items.zh: 为了系统评估具有多模态提示的智能体，我们开发了一个新的基准，名为VIMA-Bench，构建在Ravens模拟器之上（Zeng等人，2020；Shridhar等人，2021）。我们提供了17个具有多模态提示模板的代表性任务。每个任务可以通过纹理和桌面物体的各种组合程序化地实例化为数千个实例。VIMA-Bench建立了一个四级协议，用于评估从随机物体放置到新颖任务逐步增强的泛化能力（图2）。

items.en: To this end, we introduce the VisuoMotor Attention agent (VIMA) to learn robot manipulation from multimodal prompts. The model architecture follows the encoder-decoder transformer design proven to be effective and scalable in NLP (Raffel et al., 2020). VIMA encodes an input sequence of interleaving textual and visual prompt tokens with a pre-trained language model (Tsimpoukelli et al., 2021) and decodes robot control actions autoregressively for each environment interaction step. The transformer decoder is conditioned on the prompt via cross-attention layers that alternate with the usual causal self-attention. Instead of operating on raw images, VIMA adopts an object-centric approach. We parse all images in the prompt or observation into objects by off-the-shelf then domain fine-tuned detectors (He et al., 2017) and flatten them into sequences of object tokens. To demonstrate the scalability of VIMA, we train a spectrum of 7 models ranging from 2M to 200M parameters. Our approach outperforms other design alternatives, such as image patch tokens (Reed et al., 2022), image Perceiver (Jaegle et al., 2021b; Alayrac et al., 2022), and decoder-only conditioning (Radford et al., 2018). VIMA obtains consistent performance gains across all four levels of zero-shot generalization and all model capacities, in some cases by a large margin (up to 2.9×2.9\times task success rate given the same amount of training data, and 2.7×2.7\times better even with 10×10\times less data). We open-source the simulation environment, training dataset, algorithm code, and pre-trained model checkpoints to ensure reproducibility and facilitate future work from the community. These materials along with video demos are available at vimalabs.github.io.
items.zh: 为此，我们引入了视觉运动注意力智能体（VIMA）来从多模态提示中学习机器人操作。模型架构遵循编码器-解码器Transformer设计，该设计在NLP中被证明有效且可扩展（Raffel等人，2020）。VIMA使用预训练语言模型（Tsimpoukelli等人，2021）对交织文本和视觉提示标记的输入序列进行编码，并为每个环境交互步骤自回归地解码机器人控制动作。Transformer解码器通过交叉注意力层（与通常的因果自注意力交替）以提示为条件。VIMA不直接操作原始图像，而是采用以对象为中心的方法。我们通过现成然后领域微调的检测器（He等人，2017）将提示或观察中的所有图像解析为对象，并将它们展平为对象标记序列。为了展示VIMA的可扩展性，我们训练了从2M到200M参数的7个模型。我们的方法优于其他设计替代方案，如图像块标记（Reed等人，2022）、图像感知器（Jaegle等人，2021b；Alayrac等人，2022）和解码器仅条件（Radford等人，2018）。VIMA在所有四个零样本泛化级别和所有模型容量上获得一致的性能提升，在某些情况下提升幅度很大（在相同训练数据下任务成功率高达2.9倍，即使数据减少10倍，性能仍好2.7倍）。我们开源了仿真环境、训练数据集、算法代码和预训练模型检查点，以确保可重复性并促进社区的未来工作。这些材料以及视频演示可在vimalabs.github.io获取。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Evaluation Protocol in VIMA-Bench. We design 4 levels of evaluation settings to systematically measure the zero-shot generalization capability of an agent. Each level deviates more from the training distribution, and thus is strictly more challenging than the previous level.
items.capZh: 图2：VIMA-Bench中的评估协议。我们设计了4级评估设置，以系统衡量智能体的零样本泛化能力。每个级别与训练分布的偏差更大，因此严格比前一级别更具挑战性。

items.capEn: Figure 3: VIMA Architecture. We encode the multimodal prompts with a pre-trained T5 model, and condition the robot controller on the prompt through cross-attention layers. The controller is a causal transformer decoder consisting of alternating self and cross attention layers that predicts motor commands conditioned on prompts and interaction history.
items.capZh: 图3：VIMA架构。我们使用预训练的T5模型对多模态提示进行编码，并通过交叉注意力层以提示为条件控制机器人控制器。控制器是一个因果Transformer解码器，由交替的自注意力和交叉注意力层组成，根据提示和交互历史预测电机命令。

full.secZh: 2 任务规范的多模态提示

items.en: A central and open problem in robot learning is task specification (Agrawal, 2022). In prior literature (Stepputtis et al., 2020; Dasari & Gupta, 2020; Brunke et al., 2021b), different tasks often require diverse and incompatible interfaces, resulting in siloed robot systems that do not generalize well across tasks. Our key insight is that various task specification paradigms (such as goal conditioning, video demonstration, natural language instruction) can all be instantiated as multimodal prompts (Fig. 1). Concretely, a multimodal prompt 𝒫𝒫\mathcal{P} of length l𝑙l is defined as an ordered sequence of arbitrarily interleaved texts and images 𝒫:=[x1,x2,…,xl]assign𝒫matrixsubscript𝑥1subscript𝑥2…subscript𝑥𝑙\mathcal{P}\vcentcolon=\begin{bmatrix}x_{1},x_{2},\ldots,x_{l}\end{bmatrix}, where each element xi∈{text,image}subscript𝑥𝑖textimagex_{i}\in\{\text{text},\text{image}\}.
items.zh: 机器人学习中的一个核心且开放的问题是任务规范（Agrawal，2022）。在先前文献中（Stepputtis等人，2020；Dasari & Gupta，2020；Brunke等人，2021b），不同的任务通常需要多样且不兼容的接口，导致机器人系统孤立，无法跨任务良好泛化。我们的关键见解是，各种任务规范范式（如目标条件、视频演示、自然语言指令）都可以实例化为多模态提示（图1）。具体来说，长度为l的多模态提示P定义为任意交织的文本和图像的有序序列：P := [x1, x2, ..., xl]，其中每个元素xi ∈ {文本, 图像}。

items.en: The flexibility afforded by multimodal prompts allows us to specify and build models for a variety of task specification formats. Here we consider the following six categories.
items.zh: 多模态提示提供的灵活性使我们能够指定和构建各种任务规范格式的模型。这里我们考虑以下六类。

items.en: Simple object manipulation. Simple tasks like “put <object> into <container>”, where each image in the prompt corresponds to a single object;
items.zh: 简单物体操作。简单的任务，如“将<物体>放入<容器>”，其中提示中的每个图像对应一个物体；

items.en: Visual goal reaching. Manipulating objects to reach a goal configuration, e.g., Rearrangement (Batra et al., 2020);
items.zh: 视觉目标达到。操纵物体以达到目标配置，例如重排（Batra等人，2020）；

items.en: Novel concept grounding. The prompt contains unfamiliar words like “dax” and “blicket”, which are explained by in-prompt images and then immediately used in an instruction. This tests the agent’s ability to rapidly internalize new concepts;
items.zh: 新概念接地。提示包含不熟悉的词，如“dax”和“blicket”，这些词通过提示内图像解释，然后立即用于指令。这测试了智能体快速内化新概念的能力；

items.en: One-shot video imitation. Watching a video demonstration and learning to reproduce the same motion trajectory for a particular object;
items.zh: 一次性视频模仿。观看视频演示并学习为特定物体重现相同的运动轨迹；

items.en: Visual constraint satisfaction. The robot must manipulate the objects carefully and avoid violating the (safety) constraints;
items.zh: 视觉约束满足。机器人必须小心操纵物体并避免违反（安全）约束；

items.en: Visual reasoning. Tasks that require reasoning skills, such as appearance matching “move all objects with same textures as <object> into <container>”, and visual memory “put <object> in <container> and then restore to their original position”.
items.zh: 视觉推理。需要推理能力的任务，如外观匹配“将所有与<物体>纹理相同的物体放入<容器>”，以及视觉记忆“将<物体>放入<容器>，然后恢复其原始位置”。

items.en: Note that these six categories are not mutually exclusive. For example, a task may introduce a previously unseen verb (Novel Concept) by showing a video demonstration, or combine goal reaching with visual reasoning. More details about the task suite are discussed in Appendix, Sec. B.
items.zh: 注意，这六类并非互斥。例如，一个任务可能通过展示视频演示引入一个以前未见过的动词（新概念），或者将目标达到与视觉推理相结合。关于任务套件的更多细节在附录B节中讨论。

full.sec: 3 VIMA-Bench: Benchmark for Multimodal Robot Learning
full.secZh: 3 VIMA-Bench：多模态机器人学习基准

items.en: Existing benchmarks are generally geared towards a particular task specification. To our knowledge, there is no benchmark that provides a rich suite of multimodal tasks and a comprehensive testbed for targeted probing of agent capabilities. To this end, we introduce a new benchmark suite for multimodal robot learning called VIMA-Bench. We build our benchmark by extending the Ravens robot simulator (Zeng et al., 2020). VIMA-Bench supports extensible collections of objects and textures to compose multimodal prompts and to procedurally generate a large number of tasks. Specifically, we provide 17 tasks with multimodal prompt templates, which can be instantiated into thousands of task instances. Each task belongs to one or more of the 6 task categories mentioned above. VIMA-Bench can generate large quantities of imitation learning data via scripted oracle agents. More details are elaborated in Appendix, Sec. A.
items.zh: 现有基准通常针对特定的任务规范。据我们所知，没有基准提供丰富的多模态任务套件和用于针对性探测智能体能力的综合测试平台。为此，我们引入了一个新的多模态机器人学习基准套件，称为VIMA-Bench。我们通过扩展Ravens机器人模拟器（Zeng等人，2020）来构建基准。VIMA-Bench支持可扩展的物体和纹理集合，以组合多模态提示并程序化生成大量任务。具体来说，我们提供了17个具有多模态提示模板的任务，这些模板可以实例化为数千个任务实例。每个任务属于上述6个任务类别中的一个或多个。VIMA-Bench可以通过脚本化的专家智能体生成大量模仿学习数据。更多细节在附录A节中阐述。

items.en: The observation space of our simulator includes RGB images rendered from both frontal view and top-down view. Ground-truth object segmentation and bounding boxes are also provided for training object-centric models (Sec. 4). We inherit the high-level action space from Zeng et al. (2020), which consists of primitive motor skills like “pick and place” and “wipe”. These are parameterized by poses of the end effector. Our simulator also features scripted oracle programs that can generate expert demonstrations by using privileged simulator state information, such as the precise location of all objects, and the ground-truth interpretation of the multimodal instruction.
items.zh: 我们的模拟器的观测空间包括从正面和俯视图渲染的RGB图像。还提供了真实物体分割和边界框，用于训练以物体为中心的模型（第4节）。我们继承了Zeng等人（2020）的高级动作空间，其中包括诸如“拾取和放置”和“擦拭”等基本运动技能。这些技能由末端执行器的姿态参数化。我们的模拟器还具有脚本化的oracle程序，可以通过使用特权模拟器状态信息（例如所有物体的精确位置以及多模态指令的真实解释）来生成专家演示。

items.en: We leverage oracles to generate a large offline dataset of expert trajectories for imitation learning. Our dataset includes 50K trajectories per task, and 650K successful trajectories in total. We hold out a subset of objects and textures for evaluation and designate 4 out of 17 tasks as a testbed for zero-shot generalization.
items.zh: 我们利用oracle生成一个大型离线数据集，用于模仿学习的专家轨迹。我们的数据集每个任务包含50K条轨迹，总共650K条成功轨迹。我们保留一部分物体和纹理用于评估，并将17个任务中的4个指定为零样本泛化的测试平台。

items.en: Each task in VIMA-Bench has a binary success criterion and does not provide partial reward. During test time, we execute agent policies in the simulator for multiple episodes to compute a percentage success rate. The average success rate over all evaluated tasks will be the final reported metric.
items.zh: VIMA-Bench中的每个任务都有一个二元成功标准，并且不提供部分奖励。在测试期间，我们在模拟器中执行智能体策略多个回合，以计算成功率百分比。所有评估任务的平均成功率将是最终报告的指标。

items.en: We design a four-level evaluation protocol (Fig. 2) to systematically probe the generalization capabilities of learned agents. Each level deviates more from the training distribution, and is thus strictly harder than the previous one.
items.zh: 我们设计了一个四级评估协议（图2），以系统地探测学习智能体的泛化能力。每个级别与训练分布的偏差更大，因此严格比前一级别更难。

items.en: Placement generalization. All prompts are seen verbatim during training, but only the placement of objects on the tabletop is randomized at testing;
items.zh: 放置泛化。训练期间所有提示都逐字出现，但测试时仅随机化桌面上物体的放置；

items.en: Combinatorial generalization. All textures and objects are seen during training, but new combinations of them appear in testing;
items.zh: 组合泛化。训练期间所有纹理和物体都出现过，但测试中出现它们的新组合；

items.en: Novel object generalization. Test prompts and the simulated workspace include novel textures and objects;
items.zh: 新物体泛化。测试提示和模拟工作空间包括新的纹理和物体；

items.en: Novel task generalization. New tasks with novel prompt templates at test time.
items.zh: 新任务泛化。测试时出现带有新提示模板的新任务。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Scaling model and data. Top: We compare performance of different methods with model sizes ranging from 2M to 200M parameters. Across all model sizes and generalization levels, VIMA outperforms baseline variants. Bottom: For a fixed model size of 92M parameters we compare the effect of imitation learning dataset size with 0.1%percent0.10.1\%, 1%percent11\%, 10%percent1010\%, and full data. VIMA is extremely sample efficient and can achieve performance comparable to other methods with 10×10\times less data.
items.capZh: 图4：缩放模型和数据。顶部：我们比较了不同方法在模型大小从2M到200M参数范围内的性能。在所有模型大小和泛化级别上，VIMA都优于基线变体。底部：对于固定的92M参数模型大小，我们比较了模仿学习数据集大小的影响，分别使用0.1%、1%、10%和全部数据。VIMA非常样本高效，可以在数据量少10倍的情况下达到与其他方法相当的性能。

full.secZh: 4 VIMA：视觉运动注意力智能体

items.en: Our goal is to build a robot agent capable of performing any task specified by multimodal prompts. There is no prior method that works out of the box with multimodal prompts. To learn an effective multi-task robot policy, we propose VIMA, a robot agent with a multi-task encoder-decoder architecture and object-centric design (Fig. 3). Concretely, we learn a robot policy π​(at|𝒫,ℋ)𝜋conditionalsubscript𝑎𝑡𝒫ℋ\pi(a_{t}|\mathcal{P},\mathcal{H}), where ℋ:=[o1,a1,o2,a2,…,ot]assignℋmatrixsubscript𝑜1subscript𝑎1subscript𝑜2subscript𝑎2…subscript𝑜𝑡\mathcal{H}\vcentcolon=\begin{bmatrix}o_{1},a_{1},o_{2},a_{2},\ldots,o_{t}\end{bmatrix} denotes the past interaction history, and ot∈𝒪,at∈𝒜formulae-sequencesubscript𝑜𝑡𝒪subscript𝑎𝑡𝒜o_{t}\in\mathcal{O},a_{t}\in\mathcal{A} are observations and actions at each interaction steps. We encode multimodal prompts via a frozen pre-trained language model and decode robot waypoint commands conditioned on the encoded prompts via cross-attention layers. Unlike prior work (Florence et al., 2019; Sieb et al., 2019; Zhu et al., 2022), VIMA adopts an object-centric representation that computes tokens from bounding box coordinates and cropped RGB patches.
items.zh: 我们的目标是构建一个能够执行多模态提示指定的任何任务的机器人智能体。目前没有现成的方法可以直接处理多模态提示。为了学习有效的多任务机器人策略，我们提出了VIMA，一种具有多任务编码器-解码器架构和以物体为中心设计的机器人智能体（图3）。具体来说，我们学习一个机器人策略π(at|P, H)，其中H := [o1, a1, o2, a2, ..., ot]表示过去的交互历史，ot ∈ O, at ∈ A是每个交互步骤的观测和动作。我们通过冻结的预训练语言模型编码多模态提示，并通过交叉注意力层基于编码的提示解码机器人航点命令。与先前的工作（Florence等人，2019；Sieb等人，2019；Zhu等人，2022）不同，VIMA采用以物体为中心的表示，从边界框坐标和裁剪的RGB补丁计算标记。

items.en: There are 333 formats of raw input in the prompt — text, image of a single object, and image of a full tabletop scene (e.g., for Rearrangement or imitation from video frames). For text inputs, we use pre-trained T5 tokenizer and word embedding to obtain word tokens. For images of full scenes, we first extract individual objects using domain fine-tuned Mask R-CNN (He et al., 2017) (Appendix, Sec. C.4). Each object is represented as a bounding box and a cropped image. We then compute object tokens by encoding them with a bounding box encoder and a ViT (Dosovitskiy et al., 2020), respectively. Since Mask R-CNN is imperfect, the bounding boxes can be noisy and the cropped images may have irrelevant pixels. For images of single objects, we obtain tokens in the same way except with a dummy bounding box. Prompt tokenization produces a sequence of interleaved textual and visual tokens. We then follow the practice in Tsimpoukelli et al. (2021) and encode the prompt via a pre-trained T5 encoder (Raffel et al., 2020). Since T5 has been pre-trained on large text corpora, VIMA inherits the semantic understanding capability and robustness properties. To accommodate tokens from new modalities, we insert MLPs between non-textual tokens and T5.
items.zh: 提示中有3种原始输入格式——文本、单个物体的图像和完整桌面场景的图像（例如，用于重新排列或从视频帧模仿）。对于文本输入，我们使用预训练的T5分词器和词嵌入来获得词标记。对于完整场景的图像，我们首先使用领域微调的Mask R-CNN（He等人，2017）（附录，第C.4节）提取单个物体。每个物体表示为一个边界框和一个裁剪图像。然后，我们分别通过边界框编码器和ViT（Dosovitskiy等人，2020）对它们进行编码，得到物体标记。由于Mask R-CNN不完美，边界框可能有噪声，裁剪图像可能包含无关像素。对于单个物体的图像，我们以相同方式获得标记，只是使用虚拟边界框。提示分词产生一个交错的文本和视觉标记序列。然后，我们遵循Tsimpoukelli等人（2021）的做法，通过预训练的T5编码器（Raffel等人，2020）编码提示。由于T5已在大型文本语料库上预训练，VIMA继承了语义理解能力和鲁棒性。为了容纳来自新模态的标记，我们在非文本标记和T5之间插入MLP。

items.en: A challenging aspect of designing a multi-task policy is to select a suitable conditioning mechanism. In our schema (Fig. 3), the robot controller (decoder) is conditioned on the prompt sequence 𝒫𝒫\mathcal{P} by a series of cross-attention layers between 𝒫𝒫\mathcal{P} and the trajectory history sequence ℋℋ\mathcal{H}. We compute key K𝒫subscript𝐾𝒫K_{\mathcal{P}} and value V𝒫subscript𝑉𝒫V_{\mathcal{P}} sequences from the prompt and query Qℋsubscript𝑄ℋQ_{\mathcal{H}} from the trajectory history, following the encoder-decoder convention in Raffel et al. (2020). Each cross-attention layer then generates an output sequence ℋ′=softmax​(Qℋ​K𝒫⊺d)​V𝒫superscriptℋ′softmaxsubscript𝑄ℋsubscriptsuperscript𝐾⊺𝒫𝑑subscript𝑉𝒫\mathcal{H}^{\prime}=\text{softmax}\left(\frac{Q_{\mathcal{H}}K^{\intercal}_{\mathcal{P}}}{\sqrt{d}}\right)V_{\mathcal{P}}, where d𝑑d is the embedding dimension. Residual connections are added to connect higher layers with the input rollout trajectory sequence. The cross-attention design enjoys three advantages: 1) strengthened connection to prompt; 2) intact and deep flow of the original prompt tokens; and 3) better computational efficiency. VIMA decoder consists of L𝐿L alternating cross-attention and self-attention layers. Finally, we follow common practice (Baker et al., 2022) to map predicted action tokens to discretized poses of the robot arm. See Appendix, Sec. C.2 for more details.
items.zh: 设计多任务策略的一个挑战方面是选择合适的条件机制。在我们的方案中（图3），机器人控制器（解码器）通过P和轨迹历史序列H之间的一系列交叉注意力层以提示序列P为条件。我们根据Raffel等人（2020）的编码器-解码器惯例，从提示计算键K_P和值V_P序列，从轨迹历史计算查询Q_H。然后每个交叉注意力层生成输出序列H' = softmax(Q_H K_P^T / sqrt(d)) V_P，其中d是嵌入维度。添加残差连接以将较高层与输入展开轨迹序列连接。交叉注意力设计具有三个优点：1）加强与提示的连接；2）原始提示标记的完整和深层流动；3）更好的计算效率。VIMA解码器由L个交替的交叉注意力和自注意力层组成。最后，我们遵循常见做法（Baker等人，2022）将预测的动作标记映射到机器人手臂的离散化姿态。更多细节见附录，第C.2节。

items.en: We follow behavioral cloning to train our models by minimizing the negative log-likelihood of predicted actions. Concretely, for a trajectory with T𝑇T steps, we optimize minθ​∑t=1T−log⁡πθ​(at|𝒫,ℋ)subscript𝜃superscriptsubscript𝑡1𝑇subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝑎𝑡𝒫ℋ\min_{\theta}\sum_{t=1}^{T}-\log\pi_{\theta}(a_{t}|\mathcal{P},\mathcal{H}). The entire training is conducted on an offline dataset with no simulator access. To make VIMA robust to detection inaccuracies and failures, we apply object augmentation by randomly injecting false-positive detection outputs. After training, we select model checkpoints for evaluation based on the aggregated accuracy on a held-out validation set. The evaluation involves interacting with the physics simulator. We follow the best practices to train Transformer models. See Appendix, Sec. D for comprehensive training hyperparameters.
items.zh: 我们遵循行为克隆，通过最小化预测动作的负对数似然来训练模型。具体来说，对于具有T步的轨迹，我们优化min_θ ∑_{t=1}^T -log π_θ(at|P, H)。整个训练在离线数据集上进行，无需访问模拟器。为了使VIMA对检测不准确和失败具有鲁棒性，我们通过随机注入假阳性检测输出来应用物体增强。训练后，我们根据在保留验证集上的聚合准确率选择模型检查点进行评估。评估涉及与物理模拟器交互。我们遵循最佳实践来训练Transformer模型。全面的训练超参数见附录，第D节。

items.en: In this section, we aim to answer three main questions:
items.zh: 在本节中，我们旨在回答三个主要问题：

items.en: What is the best recipe for building multi-task transformer-based robot agents with multimodal prompts?
items.zh: 构建具有多模态提示的多任务基于Transformer的机器人智能体的最佳方法是什么？

items.en: What are the scaling properties of our approach in model capacity and data size?
items.zh: 我们的方法在模型容量和数据大小方面的缩放属性是什么？

items.en: How do different components, such as visual tokenizers, prompt conditioning, and prompt encoding, affect robot performance?
items.zh: 不同组件，如视觉分词器、提示条件和提示编码，如何影响机器人性能？

items.en: Because there is no prior method that works out of the box with our multimodal prompting setup, we make our best effort to select a number of representative transformer-based agent architectures as baselines, and re-interpret them to be compatible with VIMA-Bench:
items.zh: 由于没有现成的方法可以直接处理我们的多模态提示设置，我们尽力选择了一些代表性的基于Transformer的智能体架构作为基线，并重新解释它们以与VIMA-Bench兼容：

items.en: Gato (Reed et al., 2022) introduces a decoder-only model that solves tasks from multiple domains where tasks are specified by prompting the model with the observation and action subsequence. For a fair comparison, we provide the same conditioning as VIMA, i.e., our multimodal encoded prompts. Input images are divided into patches and encoded by a ViT model to produce observation tokens. This variant is referred to as “VIMA-Gato”.
items.zh: Gato（Reed等人，2022）引入了一种仅解码器模型，通过用观测和动作子序列提示模型来解决来自多个领域的任务。为了公平比较，我们提供与VIMA相同的条件，即我们的多模态编码提示。输入图像被分割成补丁并由ViT模型编码以产生观测标记。此变体称为“VIMA-Gato”。

items.en: Flamingo (Alayrac et al., 2022) is a vision-language model that learns to generate textual completion in response to multimodal prompts. It embeds a variable number of prompt images into a fixed number of tokens via Perceiver (Jaegle et al., 2021b), and conditions the language decoder on the encoded prompt by cross-attention. Flamingo does not work with embodied agents out of the box. We adapt it to support decision-making by replacing the output layer with robot action heads. We denote the method as “VIMA-Flamingo”.
items.zh: Flamingo（Alayrac等人，2022）是一种视觉语言模型，学习生成文本补全以响应多模态提示。它通过Perceiver（Jaegle等人，2021b）将可变数量的提示图像嵌入到固定数量的标记中，并通过交叉注意力以编码提示为条件对语言解码器进行条件化。Flamingo不能直接用于具身智能体。我们通过将输出层替换为机器人动作头来使其支持决策。我们将该方法称为“VIMA-Flamingo”。

items.en: VIMA-GPT is a decoder-only architecture conditioned on tokenized multimodal prompts. It autoregressively decodes the next actions given instructions and interaction histories. Similar to prior work (Chen et al., 2021; Janner et al., 2021), it encodes an image into a single state token by a ViT encoder and prepends the rollout trajectory with prompt tokens. This baseline does not use cross-attention.
items.zh: VIMA-GPT是一种仅解码器架构，以标记化的多模态提示为条件。它根据指令和交互历史自回归地解码下一步动作。与先前工作类似（Chen等人，2021；Janner等人，2021），它通过ViT编码器将图像编码为单个状态标记，并在提示标记前添加展开轨迹。该基线未使用交叉注意力。

items.en: A more detailed comparison between these variants can be found in Appendix, Sec. C.1.
items.zh: 这些变体之间的更详细比较见附录C.1节。

items.en: We compare VIMA against the baseline variants on four levels of generalization provided in our benchmark for different model and training dataset sizes. Our empirical results demonstrate that VIMA’s choice of object tokens combined with cross-attention conditioning is the most effective recipe among the model designs we consider.
items.zh: 我们在基准测试中提供的四个泛化级别上，针对不同模型和训练数据集大小，将VIMA与基线变体进行比较。我们的实验结果表明，VIMA选择的对象标记结合交叉注意力条件设置是我们考虑的模型设计中最有效的方案。

items.en: We train all methods for a spectrum of model capacities from 2M to 200M parameters, evenly spaced on the log scale (Fig. 4). The encoder size is kept constant (T5-Base, 111M) for all methods and excluded from the parameter count. Across all levels of zero-shot generalization, we find that VIMA strongly outperforms other alternatives. Although models like VIMA-Gato and VIMA-Flamingo show improved performance with bigger model sizes, VIMA consistently achieves superior performance over all model sizes. We note that this can only be achieved with both cross-attention and object token sequence representations — altering any component will significantly degrade the performance, especially in the low model capacity regime (ablations in Sec. 5.3).
items.zh: 我们在从2M到200M参数（对数尺度上均匀分布）的模型容量范围内训练所有方法（图4）。编码器大小保持不变（T5-Base，111M），且不计入参数计数。在所有零样本泛化级别上，我们发现VIMA显著优于其他替代方案。尽管VIMA-Gato和VIMA-Flamingo等模型随着模型规模增大性能有所提升，但VIMA在所有模型规模上始终表现出更优的性能。我们注意到，这只能通过同时使用交叉注意力和对象标记序列表示来实现——改变任何组件都会显著降低性能，尤其是在低模型容量区域（第5.3节的消融实验）。

items.capEn: Figure 5: VIMA incurs much less performance drop than baselines as we evaluate on progressively harder settings.
items.capZh: 图5：随着我们在逐渐更难的设置上进行评估，VIMA的性能下降远小于基线。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Ablation on visual tokenizers. We compare the performance of VIMA-200M model across different visual tokenizers. Our proposed object tokens outperform all methods that learn directly from raw pixels, and Object Perceiver that downsamples the object sequence to a fixed number of tokens.
items.capZh: 图6：视觉标记器的消融实验。我们比较了VIMA-200M模型在不同视觉标记器下的性能。我们提出的对象标记优于所有直接从原始像素学习的方法，以及将对象序列下采样到固定数量标记的Object Perceiver。

items.en: Next we investigate how different methods scale with varying dataset sizes. We compare model performance at 0.1%percent0.10.1\%, 1%percent11\%, 10%percent1010\% and full imitation learning dataset provided in VIMA-Bench (Fig. 4). Note that to ensure all methods are fairly pre-trained on the same amount of data, we initialize baseline variants that directly learn from raw pixels with MVP pre-trained ViT (Xiao et al., 2022; Radosavovic et al., 2022). It is further MAE fine-tuned (He et al., 2021), using the same in-domain data as for the Mask R-CNN object detector. See Appendix, Sec. E.3 for detailed setup. VIMA is extremely sample efficient and, with just 1%percent11\% of the data, can achieve performance similar to baseline methods trained with 10×10\times more data on L1 and L2 levels of generalization. In fact, for L4 we find that with just 1%percent11\% of training data, VIMA already surpasses other variants trained with entire dataset. Finally, across all levels with just 10%percent1010\% of the data, VIMA can outperform other architectures trained with the full dataset by a significant margin. We hypothesize that the data efficiency can be attributed to the object-centric representation employed in the VIMA recipe, which is less prone to overfitting than learning directly from pixels in the low-data regime. This is consistent with findings from Sax et al. (2018), which demonstrates that embodied agents conditioned on mid-level visual representations tend to be significantly more sample-efficient than end-to-end control from raw pixels.
items.zh: 接下来，我们研究不同方法如何随数据集大小变化而扩展。我们比较了模型在VIMA-Bench提供的模仿学习数据集的0.1%、1%、10%和完整数据集上的性能（图4）。注意，为确保所有方法在相同数据量上公平预训练，我们使用MVP预训练的ViT（Xiao等人，2022；Radosavovic等人，2022）初始化直接从原始像素学习的基线变体。该ViT进一步使用与Mask R-CNN对象检测器相同的域内数据进行MAE微调（He等人，2021）。详细设置见附录E.3节。VIMA极其样本高效，仅使用1%的数据即可在L1和L2泛化级别上达到使用10倍数据训练的基线方法类似的性能。事实上，对于L4，我们发现仅使用1%的训练数据，VIMA就已经超越了使用完整数据集训练的其他变体。最后，在所有级别上，仅使用10%的数据，VIMA就能以显著优势超越使用完整数据集训练的其他架构。我们假设，数据效率可归因于VIMA方案中采用的对象中心表示，它在低数据区域比直接从像素学习更不易过拟合。这与Sax等人（2018）的发现一致，该发现表明以中级视觉表示为条件的具身智能体往往比从原始像素进行端到端控制具有显著更高的样本效率。

items.en: Finally, we compare the relative performance degradation as we test the models on progressively challenging zero-shot evaluation levels without further fine-tuning (Fig. 5). Our method exhibits a minimal performance regression, especially between L​1→L​2→𝐿1𝐿2L1\rightarrow L2 and L​1→L​3→𝐿1𝐿3L1\rightarrow L3. In contrast, the baselines can degrade as much as 20%percent2020\%, particularly in more difficult generalization scenarios. Although all methods degrade significantly when evaluated on L​4𝐿4L4 (Novel Tasks), the performance drop for VIMA is only half as severe as all other baselines. These results suggest that VIMA has developed a more generalizable policy and robust representations than the alternative approaches.
items.zh: 最后，我们比较了在无需进一步微调的情况下，模型在逐渐具有挑战性的零样本评估级别上的相对性能下降（图5）。我们的方法表现出最小的性能回归，尤其是在L1→L2和L1→L3之间。相比之下，基线可能下降多达20%，尤其是在更困难的泛化场景中。尽管所有方法在L4（新任务）上评估时性能都显著下降，但VIMA的性能下降仅为其他基线的一半。这些结果表明，VIMA已经开发出比替代方法更具泛化能力的策略和更鲁棒的表示。

items.en: Through extensive experiments, we ablate different design choices in VIMA and study their impact on robot decision making. We focus on four aspects: visual tokenization, prompt conditioning, prompt-encoding language models, and policy robustness against distractions and corruptions.
items.zh: 通过大量实验，我们消融了VIMA中的不同设计选择，并研究了它们对机器人决策的影响。我们关注四个方面：视觉标记化、提示条件设置、提示编码语言模型以及策略对干扰和损坏的鲁棒性。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Ablation on prompt conditioning. We compare our method (xattn: cross-attention prompt conditioning) with a vanilla transformer decoder (gpt-decoder) across different model sizes. Cross-attention is especially helpful in low-parameter regime and for harder generalization tasks.
items.capZh: 图7：提示条件设置的消融实验。我们比较了我们的方法（xattn：交叉注意力提示条件设置）与普通Transformer解码器（gpt-decoder）在不同模型大小下的表现。交叉注意力在低参数区域和更难的泛化任务中尤其有帮助。

items.en: As explained in Sec. 4, VIMA processes the prompt and observation images into a variable number of object tokens with a domain fine-tuned Mask R-CNN implementation. How important is this particular choice of visual tokenizer? We study 5 different variants and empirically evaluate their 4 levels of generalization performance on VIMA-Bench. 1) Ours (Oracle): instead of using Mask R-CNN, we directly read out the ground-truth bounding box from the simulator. In other words, we use a perfect object detector to estimate the upper bound on the performance of this study; 2) Object Perceiver: we apply a Perceiver module to convert the variable number of objects detected in each frame to a fixed number of tokens. Perceiver is more computationally efficient because it reduces the average sequence length; 3) Image Perceiver: the same architecture as the Perceiver Resampler in VIMA-Flamingo, which converts an image to a small, fixed number of tokens; 4) Image patches: following VIMA-Gato, we divide an RGB frame into square patches, and extract ViT embedding tokens. The number of patches is greater than the output of Image Perceiver; 5) Single image: VIMA-GPT’s tokenizer, which encodes one image into a single token.
items.zh: 如第4节所述，VIMA通过域微调的Mask R-CNN实现将提示和观察图像处理为可变数量的对象标记。这种特定的视觉标记器选择有多重要？我们研究了5种不同的变体，并在VIMA-Bench上实证评估了它们的4个泛化级别性能。1) 我们的（Oracle）：不使用Mask R-CNN，而是直接从模拟器中读取真实边界框。换句话说，我们使用完美的对象检测器来估计本研究的性能上限；2) Object Perceiver：我们应用Perceiver模块将每帧检测到的可变数量对象转换为固定数量的标记。Perceiver在计算上更高效，因为它减少了平均序列长度；3) Image Perceiver：与VIMA-Flamingo中的Perceiver Resampler架构相同，将图像转换为少量固定数量的标记；4) 图像块：遵循VIMA-Gato，将RGB帧分割为方形块，并提取ViT嵌入标记。块的数量大于Image Perceiver的输出；5) 单图像：VIMA-GPT的标记器，将一张图像编码为单个标记。

items.en: Fig. 6 shows the ablation results. We highlight a few findings. First, we note that our Mask R-CNN detection pipeline (Appendix, Sec. C.4) incurs a minimal performance loss compared to the oracle bounding boxes, thanks to the object augmentation (Sec. 4) that boosts robustness during training. Second, tokenizing from raw pixels (Image Perceiver, patches, or single embedding) consistently underperforms our object-centric format. We hypothesize that these tokenizers have to allocate extra internal capacity to parse the objects from low-level pixels, which likely impedes learning. Sax et al. (2018) echoes our finding that using mid-level vision can greatly improve agent generalization compared to an end-to-end pipeline. Third, even though Ours and Object Perceiver both use the same object bounding box inputs, the latter is significantly worse in decision making. We conclude that it is important to directly pass the variable-length object sequence to the robot controller rather than downsampling to a fixed number of tokens.
items.zh: 图6显示了消融结果。我们强调几个发现。首先，我们注意到，得益于训练期间增强鲁棒性的对象增强（第4节），我们的Mask R-CNN检测流程（附录C.4节）与Oracle边界框相比性能损失极小。其次，从原始像素进行标记化（Image Perceiver、块或单嵌入）始终不如我们的对象中心格式。我们假设这些标记器必须分配额外的内部容量来从低级像素解析对象，这很可能阻碍学习。Sax等人（2018）呼应了我们的发现，即与端到端流程相比，使用中级视觉可以大大提高智能体的泛化能力。第三，尽管我们的方法和Object Perceiver都使用相同的对象边界框输入，但后者在决策制定上明显更差。我们得出结论，直接将可变长度的对象序列传递给机器人控制器，而不是下采样到固定数量的标记，这一点很重要。

items.en: VIMA conditions the robot controller (decoder) on the encoded prompt by cross-attention. A simple alternative is to concatenate the prompt 𝒫𝒫\mathcal{P} and interaction history ℋℋ\mathcal{H} into one big sequence, and then apply a decoder-only transformer like GPT (Radford et al., 2018) to predict actions. In this ablation, we keep the object tokenizer constant and only switch the conditioning mechanism to causal sequence modeling. Note that this variant is conceptually “VIMA-Gato with object tokens”. Fig. 7 shows the comparison of VIMA (xattn) and the gpt-decoder variant across 4 generalization levels. While the variant achieves comparable performance in larger models, cross-attention still dominates in the small-capacity range and generalizes better in the most challenging L4 (Novel Task) setting. Our hypothesis is that cross-attention helps the controller stay better focused on the prompt instruction at each interaction step. This bears a resemblance to the empirical results in Sanh et al. (2021); Wang et al. (2022b), which show that well-tuned encoder-decoder architectures can outperform GPT-3 in zero-shot generalization.
items.zh: VIMA通过交叉注意力将机器人控制器（解码器）以编码后的提示为条件。一个简单的替代方案是将提示P和交互历史H连接成一个长序列，然后应用仅解码器Transformer（如GPT，Radford等人，2018）来预测动作。在此消融实验中，我们保持对象标记器不变，仅将条件设置机制切换为因果序列建模。注意，该变体概念上是“带有对象标记的VIMA-Gato”。图7显示了VIMA（xattn）和gpt-decoder变体在4个泛化级别上的比较。虽然该变体在较大模型中实现了可比的性能，但交叉注意力在小容量范围内仍然占优，并且在最具挑战性的L4（新任务）设置中泛化更好。我们的假设是，交叉注意力有助于控制器在每个交互步骤更好地聚焦于提示指令。这与Sanh等人（2021）和Wang等人（2022b）的实证结果相似，表明调整良好的编码器-解码器架构在零样本泛化中可以超越GPT-3。

items.en: We vary the size of the pre-trained T5 encoder to study the effect of prompt encoding. We experiment with three T5 capacities: small (30M), base (111M), and large (368M). We further fix the parameter count of the decision-making part to be 200M. For all T5 variants, we fine-tune the last two layers and freeze all other layers. We find no significant difference among the variants (Appendix, Sec. E.4), thus we set base as default for all our models.
items.zh: 我们改变预训练T5编码器的大小来研究提示编码的效果。我们实验了三种T5容量：small（30M）、base（111M）和large（368M）。我们进一步将决策部分的参数数量固定为200M。对于所有T5变体，我们微调最后两层并冻结所有其他层。我们发现变体之间没有显著差异（附录E.4节），因此我们将base设置为所有模型的默认值。

items.en: We study the policy robustness against increasing number of distractors and corrupted task specifications, including incomplete prompts (randomly masking out words with <UNK> token) and corrupted prompts (randomly swapping words, which could have changed the task meaning altogether). See Appendix, Sec. E.5 for exact setup and results. VIMA exhibits minimal performance degradation with increased distractors and minor decrease with corrupted prompts. We attribute this robustness to the high-quality pre-trained T5 backbone.
items.zh: 我们研究了策略对干扰物数量增加和任务规范损坏（包括不完整提示（随机用<UNK>标记掩盖单词）和损坏提示（随机交换单词，可能完全改变任务含义））的鲁棒性。具体设置和结果见附录E.5节。VIMA在干扰物增加时表现出最小的性能下降，在提示损坏时性能下降较小。我们将这种鲁棒性归因于高质量的预训练T5骨干网络。

items.en: Transformers (Vaswani et al., 2017) have enabled task unification across many AI domains (Brown et al., 2020; Chen et al., 2022a, b; Lu et al., 2022; Wang et al., 2022c). For example, in NLP, the Natural Language Decathlon (McCann et al., 2018) adopts a consistent question-answering format for a suite of 10 NLP tasks. T5 (Raffel et al., 2020) unifies all language problems into the same text-to-text format. GPT-3 (Brown et al., 2020) and Megatron (Shoeybi et al., 2019) demonstrate emergent behaviours of intuitive task specifications by zero-shot prompting. In computer vision, Pix2Seq (Chen et al., 2022b) casts many vision problems into a unified sequence format. Florence (Yuan et al., 2021), BiT (Kolesnikov et al., 2020), and MuST (Ghiasi et al., 2021) pre-train shared backbone models at scale for general visual representations and transfer them to downstream tasks. In multimodal learning, Perceiver (Jaegle et al., 2021b, a) proposes an efficient architecture to handle structured inputs and outputs. Flamingo (Alayrac et al., 2022) and Frozen (Tsimpoukelli et al., 2021) design a universal API that ingests interleaving sequences of images and text and generates free-form text. Gato (Reed et al., 2022) is a massively multi-task model across NLP, vision, and embodied agents. Our work is most similar in spirit to Gato, but we focus primarily on enabling an intuitive multimodal prompting interface for a generalist robot agent.
items.zh: Transformer（Vaswani等人，2017）实现了许多AI领域的任务统一（Brown等人，2020；Chen等人，2022a, b；Lu等人，2022；Wang等人，2022c）。例如，在NLP中，Natural Language Decathlon（McCann等人，2018）为10个NLP任务采用了一致的问答格式。T5（Raffel等人，2020）将所有语言问题统一为相同的文本到文本格式。GPT-3（Brown等人，2020）和Megatron（Shoeybi等人，2019）通过零样本提示展示了直观任务规范的涌现行为。在计算机视觉中，Pix2Seq（Chen等人，2022b）将许多视觉问题转化为统一的序列格式。Florence（Yuan等人，2021）、BiT（Kolesnikov等人，2020）和MuST（Ghiasi等人，2021）大规模预训练共享骨干模型以获取通用视觉表示，并将其迁移到下游任务。在多模态学习中，Perceiver（Jaegle等人，2021b, a）提出了一种高效架构来处理结构化输入和输出。Flamingo（Alayrac等人，2022）和Frozen（Tsimpoukelli等人，2021）设计了一个通用API，用于接收图像和文本的交错序列并生成自由形式文本。Gato（Reed等人，2022）是一个跨NLP、视觉和具身智能体的大规模多任务模型。我们的工作在精神上与Gato最为相似，但我们主要关注为通用机器人智能体启用直观的多模态提示接口。

items.en: Foundation models (Bommasani et al., 2021) have demonstrated strong emergent properties. There are many ongoing efforts to replicate this success for embodied agents (Yang et al., 2023), focusing on 3 aspects. 1) Transformer agent architecture: Decision Transformer and Trajectory Transformer (Chen et al., 2021; Janner et al., 2021; Zheng et al., 2022; Xu et al., 2022, 2023) leverage the powerful self-attention models for sequential decision making. CLIPort (Shridhar et al., 2021), Perceiver-Actor (Shridhar et al., 2022), and RT-1 (Brohan et al., 2022) apply large transformers to robot manipulation tasks. BeT (Shafiullah et al., 2022) and C-BeT (Cui et al., 2022) design novel techniques to learn from demonstrations with multiple modes with transformers. 2) Pre-training for better representations: MaskViT (Gupta et al., 2022b), R3M (Nair et al., 2022), VIP (Ma et al., 2022), and VC-1 (Majumdar et al., 2023) pre-train general visual representations for robotic perception. Li et al. (2022b) fine-tunes from LLM checkpoints to accelerate policy learning. MineDojo (Fan et al., 2022) and Ego4D (Grauman et al., 2021) provide large-scale multimodal databases to facilitate scalable policy training. 3) LLMs for robot learning: SayCan (Ahn et al., 2022) leverages PaLM (Chowdhery et al., 2022) for zero-shot concept grounding. Huang et al. (2022a), Inner Monologue (Huang et al., 2022b) and LM-Nav (Shah et al., 2022) apply LLMs to long-horizon robot planning. PaLM-E (Driess et al., 2023) is instead a multimodal language model that can be repurposed for sequential robotic manipulation planning. Ours differs from these works in our novel multimodal prompting formulation, which existing LLMs do not easily support.
items.zh: 基础模型（Bommasani等人，2021）已展现出强大的涌现特性。目前有许多持续努力试图在具身智能体上复制这一成功（Yang等人，2023），重点关注三个方面。1) Transformer智能体架构：Decision Transformer和Trajectory Transformer（Chen等人，2021；Janner等人，2021；Zheng等人，2022；Xu等人，2022, 2023）利用强大的自注意力模型进行序列决策。CLIPort（Shridhar等人，2021）、Perceiver-Actor（Shridhar等人，2022）和RT-1（Brohan等人，2022）将大型Transformer应用于机器人操作任务。BeT（Shafiullah等人，2022）和C-BeT（Cui等人，2022）设计了新颖技术，通过Transformer从具有多种模式的演示中学习。2) 预训练以获得更好的表示：MaskViT（Gupta等人，2022b）、R3M（Nair等人，2022）、VIP（Ma等人，2022）和VC-1（Majumdar等人，2023）预训练通用视觉表示用于机器人感知。Li等人（2022b）从LLM检查点微调以加速策略学习。MineDojo（Fan等人，2022）和Ego4D（Grauman等人，2021）提供大规模多模态数据库以促进可扩展的策略训练。3) 用于机器人学习的LLM：SayCan（Ahn等人，2022）利用PaLM（Chowdhery等人，2022）进行零样本概念接地。Huang等人（2022a）、Inner Monologue（Huang等人，2022b）和LM-Nav（Shah等人，2022）将LLM应用于长时域机器人规划。PaLM-E（Driess等人，2023）则是一个多模态语言模型，可重新用于顺序机器人操作规划。我们的工作与这些研究的不同之处在于我们新颖的多模态提示公式，现有LLM不易支持该公式。

items.en: A wide range of robot manipulation tasks require different skills and task specification formats, such as instruction following (Stepputtis et al., 2020), one-shot imitation (Finn et al., 2017; Duan et al., 2017), rearrangement (Batra et al., 2020), constraint satisfaction (Brunke et al., 2021a), and reasoning (Shridhar et al., 2020). Multiple physics simulation benchmarks are introduced to study the above tasks. For example, iGibson (Shen et al., 2020; Li et al., 2021; Srivastava et al., 2021; Li et al., 2022a) simulates interactive household scenarios. Ravens (Zeng et al., 2020) and Robosuite (Zhu et al., 2020; Fan et al., 2021) design various tabletop manipulation tasks with realistic robot arms. CALVIN (Mees et al., 2021) develops long-horizon language-conditioned tasks. Meta-World (Yu et al., 2019) is a widely used simulator benchmark studying robotics manipulation with tabletop settings. CausalWorld (Ahmed et al., 2021) is a benchmark for causal structure and transfer learning in manipulation, requiring long-horizon planning and precise low-level motor control. AI2-THOR (Ehsani et al., 2021; Deitke et al., 2022) is a framework that supports visual object manipulation and procedural generation of environments. Our VIMA-Bench is the first robot learning benchmark to support multimodal-prompted tasks. We also standardize the evaluation protocol to systematically measure an agent’s generalization capabilities.
items.zh: 广泛的机器人操作任务需要不同的技能和任务规范格式，例如指令跟随（Stepputtis等人，2020）、一次性模仿（Finn等人，2017；Duan等人，2017）、重排（Batra等人，2020）、约束满足（Brunke等人，2021a）和推理（Shridhar等人，2020）。为了研究上述任务，引入了多个物理模拟基准。例如，iGibson（Shen等人，2020；Li等人，2021；Srivastava等人，2021；Li等人，2022a）模拟交互式家庭场景。Ravens（Zeng等人，2020）和Robosuite（Zhu等人，2020；Fan等人，2021）设计了各种桌面操作任务，使用逼真的机器人手臂。CALVIN（Mees等人，2021）开发了长时域语言条件任务。Meta-World（Yu等人，2019）是一个广泛使用的模拟器基准，研究桌面设置下的机器人操作。CausalWorld（Ahmed等人，2021）是一个用于操作中因果结构和迁移学习的基准，需要长时域规划和精确的低级电机控制。AI2-THOR（Ehsani等人，2021；Deitke等人，2022）是一个支持视觉对象操作和环境程序化生成的框架。我们的VIMA-Bench是第一个支持多模态提示任务的机器人学习基准。我们还标准化了评估协议，以系统性地衡量智能体的泛化能力。

items.en: An extended review can be found in Appendix, Sec. F.
items.zh: 扩展综述见附录F节。

items.en: In this work, we introduce a novel multimodal prompting formulation that converts diverse robot manipulation tasks into a uniform sequence modeling problem. We instantiate this formulation in VIMA-Bench, a diverse benchmark with multimodal tasks and systematic evaluation protocols for generalization. We propose VIMA, a conceptually simple transformer-based agent capable of solving tasks such as visual goal reaching, one-shot video imitation, and novel concept grounding with a single model. Through comprehensive experiments, we show that VIMA exhibits strong model scalability and zero-shot generalization. Therefore, we recommend our agent design as a solid starting point for future work.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们引入了一种新颖的多模态提示公式，将多样化的机器人操作任务转化为统一的序列建模问题。我们在VIMA-Bench中实例化了该公式，这是一个包含多模态任务和系统化泛化评估协议的多样化基准。我们提出了VIMA，一个概念上简单的基于Transformer的智能体，能够通过单一模型解决视觉目标到达、一次性视频模仿和新颖概念接地等任务。通过全面的实验，我们展示了VIMA具有强大的模型可扩展性和零样本泛化能力。因此，我们推荐我们的智能体设计作为未来工作的坚实起点。
